---
title: "orchestrator.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\orchestrator.py"
loc: 81
complexity: 13
logic_score: 4.65
style_score: 3.65
intel_score: 6.34
overall_score: 3.15
---

## Intent
The `orchestrator.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SovereignOrchestrator, __init__, execute_search, web_fallback, create_payload. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignOrchestrator, __init__, execute_search, web_fallback, create_payload. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.payload](file://src.core.payload)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.tools.brave_search](file://src.tools.brave_search)
- [src.tools.gemini_search](file://src.tools.gemini_search)

### Exports
- `SovereignOrchestrator`
- `__init__`
- `execute_search`
- `web_fallback`
- `create_payload`
